meta.description: Legacy event definitions for the Pandemic Legacy-inspired narrative event deck. Events trigger based on campaign state and permanently alter the campaign.

imperial-crackdown.name: Imperial Crackdown
imperial-crackdown.narrativeText: In response to rebel activity, Imperial command has authorized a sector-wide crackdown. Patrols are doubled and civilian movement is restricted. The cost of resistance just went up.

underground-contact.name: Underground Contact
underground-contact.narrativeText: A coded transmission arrives from an unknown source: 'The shipment you're looking for is in the warehouse district. Second dock, third container. Don't be late.' Someone is watching -- and helping.

wounded-rally.name: Wounded but Unbroken
wounded-rally.narrativeText: Word of your team's injuries has spread through the resistance network. Inspired by your sacrifice, local cells have pooled resources to support the cause.

act2-escalation.name: The Empire Strikes Back
act2-escalation.narrativeText: Imperial High Command has taken notice of Tangrene. A Star Destroyer enters orbit, and ground forces receive significant reinforcements. The liberation just got harder.

defector-opportunity.name: A Crack in the Armor
defector-opportunity.narrativeText: An Imperial officer has made contact through back channels. She wants out, and she has the access codes to the garrison's shield generator. But trust is a luxury in wartime.

losing-ground.name: Losing Ground
losing-ground.narrativeText: Repeated setbacks have taken their toll. Resistance fighters are deserting, supply lines are compromised, and the Empire is emboldened. You must turn the tide soon.

momentum-surge.name: The Tide Turns
momentum-surge.narrativeText: Your victories have inspired a wave of resistance across the system. Civilians are openly supporting the rebellion, and even some Imperial conscripts are reconsidering their loyalties.

critical-injury-event.name: Field Hospital
critical-injury-event.narrativeText: A sympathetic doctor operates a hidden clinic in the old town. Word reaches you that she can treat even severe battlefield injuries -- for a price, or a favor.

act3-final-push.name: Final Push
act3-final-push.narrativeText: The moment of truth approaches. All resistance cells have been activated. The fleet is standing by. Everything hinges on the assault on the command sector.

companion-betrayal.name: Betrayal
companion-betrayal.narrativeText: Not everyone fighting alongside you shares your ideals. Sometimes loyalty is just another commodity on the black market.
